text:
Needs authentication. You'll need to push using a GitHub personal access token (PAT). Run this locally with your token:

```bash
git remote set-url origin https://YOUR_TOKEN@github.com/GandhiOnchain/gtool.git
git push -u origin HEAD:main
```

Or if you have SSH set up:
```bash
git remote set-url origin git@github.com:GandhiOnchain/gtool.git
git push -u origin HEAD:main
```

You can create a PAT at **GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens** with `repo` scope. The sandbox environment can't authenticate to GitHub directly — the push needs to happen from your local machine or with a token passed inline.
